items.title: Exploding rocket casts doubts over Nasa's Moon plans
items.dek: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket is a setback for the company and for Nasa's Moon plans.
items.body: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket is a setback for the company and for Nasa's Moon plans.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attack
items.dek: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.
items.body: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nato condemns Russian 'recklessness' after drone hits Romanian apartment block
items.dek: Romania will hold an emergency meeting following the incident, in which two people were injured.
items.body: Romania will hold an emergency meeting following the incident, in which two people were injured.
items.author: IriLine Desk
